requirement_topic.en: BEE Star Labelling for LED Lamps
requirement_topic.zh: LED 灯 BEE 星级能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: LED 燈 BEE 星級能效標識

summary.en: The Bureau of Energy Efficiency administers Standards and Labelling for covered appliances, including LED lamps where listed in the programme schedule. In-scope LED lamp models may require BEE model registration, star-rating determination, label approval, and display of the prescribed label before sale. Confirm whether the current LED lamp schedule is mandatory or voluntary for the exact product type and wattage class on the date of sale.
summary.zh: 印度能效局（BEE）对计划附表涵盖的电器实施标准与标识管理，其中包括附表列明的 LED 灯。适用 LED 灯型号可能需要进行 BEE 型号注册、确定星级、取得标签批准并在销售前显示规定标签。须按销售日期确认当前 LED 灯附表对具体产品类型和功率等级为强制还是自愿。
summary.zht: 印度能效局（BEE）對計劃附表涵蓋的電器實施標準與標識管理，其中包括附表列明的 LED 燈。適用 LED 燈型號可能需要進行 BEE 型號註冊、確定星級、取得標籤批准並在銷售前顯示規定標籤。須按銷售日期確認當前 LED 燈附表對具體產品類型和功率等級為強制還是自願。

standards_or_laws: BEE Standards and Labelling Programme for LED lamps

summary.en: China may require China Energy Label or other efficiency documentation for covered lighting products. China label grade thresholds, registration portals, and marking formats are separate from BEE star ratings and cannot be cross-used as India label approval.
summary.zh: 中国可能对适用照明产品要求中国能效标识或其他能效文件。中国标签等级阈值、注册平台和标识格式与 BEE 星级不同，不能作为印度标签批准交叉使用。
summary.zht: 中國可能對適用照明產品要求中國能效標識或其他能效文件。中國標籤等級閾值、註冊平台和標識格式與 BEE 星級不同，不能作為印度標籤批准交叉使用。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label rules for covered lighting products

gap.en: BEE labelling is separate from BIS CRS. A product can need BIS registration for safety or notified CRS entry and still need BEE model registration for energy labelling. The star-rating method, label artwork, validity period, renewal cycle, and market surveillance files are India-specific.
gap.zh: BEE 标识与 BIS CRS 相互独立。产品可能因安全或被通知 CRS 条目需要 BIS 注册，同时仍需为能效标识进行 BEE 型号注册。星级计算方法、标签图样、有效期、续期周期及市场监管文件均为印度特定要求。
gap.zht: BEE 標識與 BIS CRS 相互獨立。產品可能因安全或被通知 CRS 條目需要 BIS 註冊，同時仍需為能效標識進行 BEE 型號註冊。星級計算方法、標籤圖樣、有效期、續期週期及市場監管文件均為印度特定要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the current Energy Conservation Act notification or BEE schedule makes the exact LED lamp category mandatory; otherwise voluntary programme status may apply. Standards and test methods are voluntary technical routes supporting the legal labelling programme.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only where Chinese energy-labelling law covers the China-market product; China labels are not accepted as BEE labels.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Check BEE status separately from BIS CRS. LED lamps may require BEE star labelling and model registration where the current BEE schedule makes the category mandatory; China efficiency labels do not replace BEE registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】应将 BEE 状态与 BIS CRS 分开核查。若当前 BEE 附表将相关类别列为强制，LED 灯可能需要 BEE 星级标识和型号注册；中国能效标签不能替代 BEE 注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】應將 BEE 狀態與 BIS CRS 分開核查。若當前 BEE 附表將相關類別列為強制，LED 燈可能需要 BEE 星級標識和型號註冊；中國能效標籤不能替代 BEE 註冊。
